title: Crash Rescue
popupHtml:
Crash Rescue

**Available to all characters.** Only appears after completing the first heist. Drive the woman home quickly before she bleeds out - when you get there, she'll ask to join your crew as a getaway driver. Benefits include her excellent driving skills and high composure, while vehicle choice is her lowest stat. Despite her skill, she only asks for a 5% cut - making her a perfect choice as a getaway driver for players wanting to save money while also having a good driver.

title: Drug Shootout
popupHtml:
Drug Shootout

**Available to Trevor exclusively.** A drug deal can be disrupted here. Inside of a shed rests a briefcase ($25k - $70k) that can be stolen. This location resets every week or two, so it may be repeated. Note: Some people have reported that it has stopped resetting for them, or takes a considerable amount of time before finally resetting.

title: Burial
popupHtml:
Burial

**Available to all characters.** Two men attempt to bury a woman alive. You have to kill the two men, then take the lady for a ride home. It is recommended that the woman is returned home in one piece - the reward is quite nice ($60,000). If you're playing as Trevor, she can also be delivered to the Altruist Camp for a much smaller reward.

title: Hitch Lift 1
popupHtml:
Hitch Lift 1

**Available to all characters.** Take this guy to the airport and he gives you the Tinkle Stock Tip. Stocks then rises by 30%.

title: Security Van 3
popupHtml:
Security Van 3

**Available to all characters.** You have to approach this spot after 9pm for this event to spawn. The guy will walk out of the building on the south corner of the block; just run him over and take the money. No real need to bother with the truck or the other guy.

title: Arrests 1
popupHtml:
Arrests 1

**Available to all characters.** A police officer is chasing a criminal. - Help the criminal by killing the police officer for a $250 reward and a 3 star wanted level. **OR** - Help the police officer by using a stun gun on the criminal.

title: Security Van 5
popupHtml:
Security Van 5

**Available to all characters.**

title: Security Van 9
popupHtml:
Security Van 9

**Available to all characters.**

title: Abandoned Vehicle 2
popupHtml:
Abandoned Vehicle 2

**Available to all characters.** Go to the wind farm and look for a shaking RV. You'll be attacked as you get close, so have a gun ready to put them down and complete the event.

title: Chase Thieves Country 1
popupHtml:
Chase Thieves Country 1

**Available to all characters.** Chase and kill the 4 gangsters that are robbing the man. When you get the wallet back, **keep it** for $250, otherwise he'll only reward you with $25.

title: Drunk Driver 2
popupHtml:
Drunk Driver 2

**Available to all characters.** Talk to the couple in front of the restaurant on Armadillo Avenue. Drive them home in their car for $80. If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver them to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

title: Abandoned Vehicle 1
popupHtml:
Abandoned Vehicle 1

**Available to all characters.** Approach the vehicle and you'll be shot in the face with a stun gun, waking up in front of a train soon after. Kill your attacker to complete the event. _Note: Your car will be exactly where you left it before being kidnapped._

title: Hitch Lift 2
popupHtml:
Hitch Lift 2

**Available to all characters.** Pick up Ursula on North Calafia Way. Take her home to improve your driving ability by 5 points and her phone number as a bonus. If you're playing as Trevor, you can drop her off at the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

title: Hitch Lift 4
popupHtml:
Hitch Lift 4

**Available to all characters.** Drive the runaway bride home but on the way back, her fiance will ram your car. Pull over, get out and punch him unconscious (don't kill him). Then get back in the car and drive the woman home to improve your driving ability by 5 points.

title: Hitch Lift 3
popupHtml:
Hitch Lift 3

**Available to all characters.** A woman asks you to take her to her boyfriend in Vinewood Hills. This will lead to a fight with her boyfriend and a guard, but you get 5 points added to your driving ability. If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver her to the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

title: Snatched
popupHtml:
Snatched

**Available to all characters.** A woman is being dragged into a van by two kidnappers. Shoot the tires and then kill the two men without hurting the woman. Drive her home and fight off more attackers on the way. If you're playing as Trevor, you can take her to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

title: Countryside Robbery
popupHtml:
Countryside Robbery

**Available to all characters.** Drive up to the motel where you see cops trying to stop a group of thieves. After the first robber gets shot, pick up the money he drops. Then shoot the second one and get the briefcase before trying to escape the police.

title: Prisoner Lift 1
popupHtml:
Prisoner Lift 1

**Available to Franklin and Michael exclusively.** An escaped prisoner will ask for a lift. Be ready to avoid some cops during the journey.

title: Prisoner Lift 2
popupHtml:
Prisoner Lift 2

**Available to all characters.** An escaped prisoner will ask for help, then try to steal your car.

title: Arrests 2
popupHtml:
Arrests 2

**Available to all characters.** A police officer is chasing a criminal. - Help the criminal by killing the police officer for a $250 reward and a 3 star wanted level. **OR** - Help the police officer by using a stun gun on the criminal.

title: Sport Bike Thief
popupHtml:
Sport Bike Thief

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return the bike to increase your driving ability, or keep it for yourself.

title: Rogue Altruists
popupHtml:
Rogue Altruists

**Available to Franklin and Michael exclusively.** Kill the Altruists, rescue the woman and take her home for $80.

title: Deal Gone Wrong
popupHtml:
Deal Gone Wrong

**Available to all characters.** When you get to this location, you'll see trucks and corpses on the ground. Follow the dots on the map and find the dying victim and the briefcase next to him containing $25,000. **Note:** You'll be attacked by a gang when trying to leave.

title: Car Theft 2
popupHtml:
Car Theft 2

**Available to Michael exclusively.** Kill the thief and return the stolen car to its owner, or keep it for yourself.

title: Security Van 1
popupHtml:
Security Van 1

**Available to all characters.**

title: Security Van 4
popupHtml:
Security Van 4

**Available to all characters.**

title: Gang Intimidation
popupHtml:
Gang Intimidation

**Available to all characters.** Here you might find a women waving for help saying she was attacked - but it's a trap. She'll lure you around the corner and there will be 4 gang members waiting to mug you.

title: ATM Robbery
popupHtml:
ATM Robbery

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return their victim's money, or keep it for yourself.

title: Security Van 6
popupHtml:
Security Van 6

**Available to all characters.**

title: Security Van 7
popupHtml:
Security Van 7

**Available to all characters.**

title: Car Theft 1
popupHtml:
Car Theft 1

**Available to all characters.** Increases driving skill when you return the car.

title: Security Van 2
popupHtml:
Security Van 2

**Available to all characters.**

title: Drunk Driver 1
popupHtml:
Drunk Driver 1

**Available to all characters.** If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver them to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

title: Construction Accident
popupHtml:
Construction Accident

**Available to all characters.** Tubes fell on top of a truck that had a worker inside. Use the excavator to remove the tubes **on the side of the driver's door** before the fire reaches him.

title: Simeon Yetarian
popupHtml:
Simeon Yetarian

**Available to Michael and Franklin exclusively.** Can only be triggered between [Friend Request](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13984) & [The Jewel Store Job](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13967) missions by entering the dealership.

title: Luring Girl Into Alley
popupHtml:
Luring Girl Into Alley

**Available to all characters.** Follow the girl into an alleyway and you'll be ambushed. Kill her and the attacker to complete the event.

title: Escape Paparazzi
popupHtml:
Escape Paparazzi

**Available to all characters.** Let the celebrity into your car and get ready for a chase before taking her home. Avoid killing any paparazzi, or the event will fail.

title: Bus Tour
popupHtml:
Bus Tour

**Available to all characters.** Approach the area between 7:00 & 19:00 to find a tour bus. Pay the fee and watch (or skip) the ensuing tour to complete the event.

title: Mugging 1
popupHtml:
Mugging 1

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return their victim's money, or keep it for yourself.

title: Bike Thief City 1
popupHtml:
Bike Thief City 1

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return the bike to increase your driving ability, or keep it for yourself. Returning the bike is much more profitable, as you'll receive $100,000 worth of Animal Ark stocks a few days later.

title: Getaway Driver
popupHtml:
Getaway Driver

**Available to all characters.** Be ready for a 2-star wanted level when the thieves get into your car. Unlocks [Patrick "Packie" McReary](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13241) for future heists.

title: Chase Thieves City 2
popupHtml:
Chase Thieves City 2

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thieves and return their victim's money, or keep it for yourself.

title: Security Van 10
popupHtml:
Security Van 10

**Available to all characters.**

title: Bike Thief City 2
popupHtml:
Bike Thief City 2

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return the bike to increase your driving ability, or keep it for yourself.

title: Border Patrol 1
popupHtml:
Border Patrol 1

**Available to all characters.** Three men on dirt bikes may harass you on this road. Kill them to complete the random event.

title: Security Van 8
popupHtml:
Security Van 8

**Available to all characters.**

title: Stag Do Running Man
popupHtml:
Stag Do Running Man

**Available to all characters.** Free the tied up guy and bring him home to change clothes, then take him to his wedding before time runs out.

title: Chase Thieves Country 2
popupHtml:
Chase Thieves Country 2

**Available to all characters.** Kill the bikers and return the stolen money or keep it for yourself.

title: Border Patrol 3
popupHtml:
Border Patrol 3

**Available to all characters.** Three men on dirt bikes may harass you on this road. Kill them to complete the random event.

title: ATM Robbery
popupHtml:
ATM Robbery

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief to return their victim's money or keep it for yourself.

title: Countryside Gang Fight
popupHtml:
Countryside Gang Fight

**Available to Franklin and Michael exclusively.** Save the man held at gunpoint, and defeat the gang for a reward ($1000)

title: Duel
popupHtml:
Duel

**Available to all characters - but only in next-gen versions of the game.** Here, you'll find a unique armored muscle car - the Duke o' Death. Attempting to steal it triggers an ambush; two large trucks block the road, and as you drive away, you'll be chased by numerous enemies.

title: Mugging 3
popupHtml:
Mugging 3

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return their victim's money, or keep it for yourself.

title: ATM Robbery
popupHtml:
ATM Robbery

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief to return their victim's money or keep it for yourself.

title: Mugging 2
popupHtml:
Mugging 2

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief and return the money, or keep it for yourself.

title: Border Patrol 2
popupHtml:
Border Patrol 2

**Available to all characters.** Three men on dirt bikes may harass you on this road. Kill them to complete the random event.

title: Shop Robbery 2
popupHtml:
Shop Robbery 2

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thieves and return their ill gotten gains or keep them for yourself.

title: Chase Thieves City 1
popupHtml:
Chase Thieves City 1

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thieves and return the money, or keep it for yourself.

title: ATM Robbery
popupHtml:
ATM Robbery

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thief to return their victim's money or keep it for yourself.

title: Domestic
popupHtml:
Domestic

**Available to all characters.** Drive the man to the golf club.

title: Sea Plane
popupHtml:
Sea Plane

**Available to all characters, but only in next-gen versions of the game.** Inside the cove, a group of enemies lurk near a plane. Steal the plane and avoid the additional enemies that arrive in boats to complete the event.

title: Shop Robbery 1
popupHtml:
Shop Robbery 1

**Available to all characters.** Kill the thieves and return their ill gotten gains or keep them for yourself.

title: Monkey Mosaic
popupHtml:
Monkey Mosaic

**Available to all characters, but only in next-gen versions of the game.** After taking pictures of all 50 Monkey Mosaics and purchasing at least two garages, a man will appear here, painting on the wall. Take a picture of the graffiti artist to complete the event. A Go-Go Monkey Blista vehicle will then appear in your garage!
